source_pr.title: test: fix unit test and make test running serially.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16328 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: UT fails. Root cause is running unit test parallelly (some prepare plan cache test.)

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:  Run test serially.

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: PR title: make test running serially.
failure_signature: PR title: make test running serially.
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to determine the underlying root cause from the available case data; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.
fix_pattern: test: fix unit test and make test running serially.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make test running serially.

evidence: moves prepared plan cache related tests into SerialSuites / serial suites to avoid parallel interference (executor/executor_test.go, executor/explainfor_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go).
